name: The Zenith (Anypov)
description:
'She's a beauty, eh?' -Head Researcher, Jer Flerro

Discover, Deliver, Destroy.

The Zenith is an engineering marvel, used for all sorts of operations.

The Zenith is routinely used for researching, observing, delivering, even occasional combat.

The Zenith is really a jack-of-all-trades, and is an incredibly useful ship to the many nations that benefit from it.

On The Zenith, be whoever, whatever you want!

Be the captain of the ship, a contained alien lifeform, Jesus, anything!

The Zenith yields all sorts of things, such as a laboratory, cargo bay, cafeteria, showers, personal quarters, communications, you name it! The Zenith holds up to 200 crewmen, including humans, anthropomorphic animals, various aliens, even protogens.

Have fun!

Tell me any adjustments I should make.

(Please comment any suggestions)
creator: Burning_Toast
